Uses of Class
neqsim.process.automation.WriteValidatorRegistry

Packages that use WriteValidatorRegistry
Package
Description
neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.

  • Uses of WriteValidatorRegistry in neqsim.process.automation

    Fields in neqsim.process.automation declared as WriteValidatorRegistry
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private WriteValidatorRegistry
    ProcessAutomation.validatorRegistry
    Registry of typed write validators consulted by ProcessAutomation.setVariableValueValidated(String, double, String) and ProcessAutomation.setValuesTransactional(Map, String).
    Methods in neqsim.process.automation that return WriteValidatorRegistry
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static WriteValidatorRegistry
    WriteValidatorRegistry.createDefault()
    Creates a registry pre-populated with the default validators for compressors, pumps, separators, throttling valves and heaters/coolers.
    WriteValidatorRegistry
    ProcessAutomation.getWriteValidatorRegistry()
    Returns the registry of typed write validators consulted by ProcessAutomation.setVariableValueValidated(String, double, String) and ProcessAutomation.setValuesTransactional(Map, String).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ProcessAutomation.setWriteValidatorRegistry(WriteValidatorRegistry registry)
    Replaces the registry of typed write validators.
